# Rosalind Problem: Implement_BWMatching in Kotlin

## Problem Description
BWMatching is a key algorithm for pattern matching in Burrows-Wheeler Transform (BWT) data structures. Given a string BWT and a pattern, we need to count how many times the pattern occurs in the original string.

## Solution

```kotlin
fun bwMatching(bwt: String, patterns: List<String>): List<Int> {
    // Step 1: Create the first column (sorted BWT)
    val firstColumn = bwt.toCharArray().sortedArray().joinToString("")
    
    // Step 2: Create the mapping from BWT to first column
    val bwtToFirst = createBWTToFirstMapping(bwt, firstColumn)
    
    // Step 3: Create the count matrix for first column
    val firstColumnCounts = createFirstColumnCounts(firstColumn)
    
    // Step 4: For each pattern, perform BWMatching
    return patterns.map { pattern ->
        bwMatch(pattern, bwt, firstColumn, bwtToFirst, firstColumnCounts)
    }
}

fun createBWTToFirstMapping(bwt: String, firstColumn: String): IntArray {
    val bwtToFirst = IntArray(bwt.length)
    val firstColumnCharCount = mutableMapOf<Char, Int>()
    val bwtCharCount = mutableMapOf<Char, Int>()
    
    // Create mapping from BWT positions to first column positions
    for (i in bwt.indices) {
        val char = bwt[i]
        val firstChar = firstColumn[i]
        
        // Count occurrences of each character
        firstColumnCharCount[firstChar] = firstColumnCharCount.getOrDefault(firstChar, 0) + 1
        bwtCharCount[char] = bwtCharCount.getOrDefault(char, 0) + 1
        
        // Find the position in first column for this character
        val firstIndex = firstColumn.indexOfFirst { it == char }
        val countInFirst = firstColumnCharCount.getValue(char) - 1
        val firstPosition = firstColumn.indexOfFirst { it == char } + countInFirst
        
        bwtToFirst[i] = firstPosition
    }
    
    return bwtToFirst
}

fun createFirstColumnCounts(firstColumn: String): Array<IntArray> {
    val counts = Array(firstColumn.length + 1) { IntArray(256) { 0 } }
    
    for (i in firstColumn.indices) {
        for (j in 0..255) {
            counts[i + 1][j] = counts[i][j]
        }
        counts[i + 1][firstColumn[i].code]++
    }
    
    return counts
}

fun bwMatch(pattern: String, bwt: String, firstColumn: String, 
           bwtToFirst: IntArray, firstColumnCounts: Array<IntArray>): Int {
    var top = 0
    var bottom = bwt.length - 1
    
    // Process pattern from last character to first
    for (i in pattern.length - 1 downTo 0) {
        val symbol = pattern[i]
        
        // Check if symbol exists in current range
        if (top > bottom) {
            return 0
        }
        
        // Find the range in BWT that contains symbol
        val firstOccurrence = firstColumn.indexOfFirst { it == symbol }
        val countBefore = firstColumnCounts[top][symbol.code]
        val countAfter = firstColumnCounts[bottom + 1][symbol.code]
        
        // Update top and bottom pointers
        top = firstOccurrence + countBefore
        bottom = firstOccurrence + countAfter - 1
    }
    
    return bottom - top + 1
}

// Alternative simpler implementation
fun bwMatchingSimple(bwt: String, patterns: List<String>): List<Int> {
    val firstColumn = bwt.toCharArray().sortedArray().joinToString("")
    
    // Create first to last mapping
    val firstToLast = createFirstToLastMapping(bwt, firstColumn)
    
    return patterns.map { pattern ->
        patternMatching(pattern, bwt, firstColumn, firstToLast)
    }
}

fun createFirstToLastMapping(bwt: String, firstColumn: String): IntArray {
    val firstToLast = IntArray(bwt.length)
    val firstCharPositions = mutableMapOf<Char, Int>()
    val bwtCharPositions = mutableMapOf<Char, Int>()
    
    // Count characters for proper indexing
    for (i in bwt.indices) {
        val bwtChar = bwt[i]
        val firstChar = firstColumn[i]
        
        // Get the position in first column for this character
        val firstIndex = firstColumn.indexOfFirst { it == bwtChar }
        val countInBWT = bwtCharPositions.getOrDefault(bwtChar, 0)
        val countInFirst = firstCharPositions.getOrDefault(bwtChar, 0)
        
        firstToLast[i] = firstIndex + countInFirst
        
        // Update counters
        bwtCharPositions[bwtChar] = countInBWT + 1
        firstCharPositions[firstChar] = firstCharPositions.getOrDefault(firstChar, 0) + 1
    }
    
    return firstToLast
}

fun patternMatching(pattern: String, bwt: String, firstColumn: String, 
                   firstToLast: IntArray): Int {
    var top = 0
    var bottom = bwt.length - 1
    
    // Process pattern from last character to first
    for (i in pattern.length - 1 downTo 0) {
        val symbol = pattern[i]
        
        // Find all occurrences of symbol in current range
        val newTop = findFirstOccurrence(firstColumn, symbol, top, bottom)
        val newBottom = findLastOccurrence(firstColumn, symbol, top, bottom)
        
        if (newTop == -1) {
            return 0
        }
        
        top = newTop
        bottom = newBottom
    }
    
    return bottom - top + 1
}

fun findFirstOccurrence(firstColumn: String, symbol: Char, top: Int, bottom: Int): Int {
    for (i in top..bottom) {
        if (firstColumn[i] == symbol) {
            return i
        }
    }
    return -1
}

fun findLastOccurrence(firstColumn: String, symbol: Char, top: Int, bottom: Int): Int {
    for (i in bottom downTo top) {
        if (firstColumn[i] == symbol) {
            return i
        }
    }
    return -1
}

// Main function to test
fun main() {
    val bwt = "
